headline: New Hampshire Cancels Bitcoin Bond Sale
summary: New Hampshire has canceled its plans to undertake a $100 million U.S. Bitcoin (CRYPTO: $BTC) bond sale.

raw.headline: New Hampshire Cancels Bitcoin Bond Sale
raw.summary: New Hampshire has canceled its plans to undertake a $100 million U.S. Bitcoin (CRYPTO: $BTC) bond sale.

headline: MCO Stock: Collect 9.4% Now, In Exchange For 11% Of Upside
summary: Here is a way to get paid a meaningful income now on your Moody's shares, cash you keep no matter what, in exchange for agreeing to sell at a price above today's if the stock gets there.

raw.headline: MCO Stock: Collect 9.4% Now, In Exchange For 11% Of Upside
raw.summary: Here is a way to get paid a meaningful income now on your Moody's shares, cash you keep no matter what, in exchange for agreeing to sell at a price above today's if the stock gets there.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Moodys, Raises Price Target to $575
summary: Barclays  analyst Manav Patnaik   maintains Moodys (NYSE:MCO) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $550 to $575.
